name: foundry
description: Adversarial red/green development workflow with research, brainstorm, NLSpec, and information-barriered implementation skills.

interface.shortDescription: Adversarial red/green workflow with strict PromptEnvelope information barriers
interface.longDescription: Foundry packages research, brainstorm, NLSpec derivation, and adversarial red/green implementation as thin Agent Skills adapters. The canonical workflow prompts remain under plugins/foundry/skills, while Codex loads the root skills/foundry-* adapters. Red teams write tests from the full NLSpec, green teams implement from NLSpec How plus PASS/FAIL labels only, and orchestrators preserve replayable PromptEnvelope artifacts.
defaultPrompt: Use Foundry to derive an NLSpec from this spec.
Run Foundry adversarial red/green implementation from this NLSpec.
Forge this feature through research, brainstorm, NLSpec, and adversarial implementation.
